cooling_type: Natural air cooling + liquid cooling (from design stage)
opportunity_summary: Korea's first HPC-dedicated data center. PUE 1.12 achieved via natural air cooling and liquid cooling integrated from design stage. Target PUE 1.1. Six floors, four server rooms. Launched Dec 2022. Mutually backed up across three Samsung SDS DCs.
notes: PUE 1.12 qualifies. Liquid cooling confirmed from design stage. Aims to save 21,443 tons GHG by 2035. AI/big data focus.

cooling_type: Modular cooling (low-energy, high-efficiency design)
opportunity_summary: 39,780 sqm facility opened Sept 2019. PUE 1.2. Software Defined Data Center (SDDC) design. DR facility for Samsung SDS network. Low-energy modular design.
notes: PUE 1.2 qualifies at threshold. Liquid cooling not explicitly confirmed -- modular design. Coordinates approximate.

facility_name: KT Cloud Gasan AI Data Center
cooling_type: Direct-to-chip liquid cooling (D2C) + immersion cooling
opportunity_summary: First in Korea to commercialize D2C liquid cooling for DC servers (April 2026 launch). Also testing immersion cooling (60% power savings vs air). NVIDIA B200 GPU support. 20+ kW per server rack power infra. Arista RoCEv2 AI network.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (D2C + immersion verified). First Korean commercial LC deployment. Upcoming LC facilities at Bucheon, Gaebong, Ansan.

facility_name: KT Cloud Mokdong AI Innovation Center
cooling_type: Liquid cooling + immersion cooling (demonstration)
opportunity_summary: AI Innovation Center at KT Mok-dong DC 2 Center. Opened Jan 2026. Showcases liquid cooling and immersion cooling tech. AI-based automated operations. Autonomous inspection robots. Plans to reduce staffing from 60-70 to one-third via AI.
notes: Demo/showcase center at existing facility. Liquid cooling verified in demonstration capacity.

facility_name: SK Telecom Gasan AI Data Center (Haein Cluster)
cooling_type: Direct liquid cooling + immersion cooling + precision liquid cooling (all three types)
opportunity_summary: 69,300 sqm. Korea's most advanced AI-optimized DC. All three LC types deployed: DLC, ILC, PLC. 44kW/rack density. NVIDIA H100 (Dec 2024) + H200 (Mar 2025). SK hynix HBM. Petasus AI Cloud virtualization. AI-driven power management.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (all three types verified). Haein cluster supports LLM training at national scale. Coordinates approximate within Gasan area.

facility_name: VNET Taicang Big Data Intelligent Computing Center
cooling_type: Cold plate liquid cooling (large-scale domestic cluster)
opportunity_summary: Multi-phase flagship campus in Taicang IoV Big Data Industrial Park (eastern Shanghai region). Large-scale domestic cold plate liquid cooling cluster. High power density cabinets. Green tech with increased renewable energy proportion.
notes: Qualifies on verified cold plate liquid cooling at scale. VNET's flagship AI computing campus.

cooling_type: Advanced liquid cooling (for domestic chip deployment)
opportunity_summary: 40MW wholesale order from leading internet company. Advanced liquid cooling solutions for optimized PUE. 51.4km south of Beijing in Greater Beijing Area. Domestic chip deployment support.
notes: Qualifies on 40MW and verified liquid cooling. Part of VNET's RMB 10-12B 2025 investment targeting 400-450MW new capacity.

cooling_type: Free cooling (year-round natural cold air) + liquid immersion cooling + heat pump technology
opportunity_summary: 600,000+ servers. PUE 1.09 via year-round free cooling (cold climate zone). First in China to use heat-pump technology (Green Power Certificate 2021). Wind power from local farms. Part of five 'Super Data Centers'. 26,000+ tons CO2 reduction.
notes: PUE 1.09 qualifies. Some sources report PUE 1.18; 1.09 from Alibaba's own Super DC blog. Immersion cooling deployed alongside free cooling. MW capacity not publicly disclosed.

facility_name: Alibaba Cloud Qiandao Lake Data Center
cooling_type: Deep lake water cooling (physically filtered lake water circulation, 2.5km canal loop)
opportunity_summary: Lake water free cooling 90%+ of the time (no mechanical chillers). Water pumped through DC and returned via 2.5km canal through Qingxi New Town. Design PUE <1.3, achieved PUE 1.13. 80% energy cost reduction vs mechanical cooling. 30M kWh/year saved. WUE <0.2.
notes: PUE 1.13 qualifies. Opened 2015. Unique deep lake water cooling approach. Some sources cite design PUE <1.3 but operational PUE 1.13 achieved.

facility_name: Tencent Tianjin High-tech Cloud Data Center
city: Tianjin (Bolong Lake Science Park, High-tech Zone)
cooling_type: Natural cooling + waste heat recovery + T-block modular micro-modules
opportunity_summary: Total investment 10B yuan. 15,000 racks, 300,000 server capacity. 10.54MW onsite microgrid (12M kWh/year). Natural cooling + waste heat recovery. Bolong Lake Science Park location.
notes: Liquid cooling not explicitly verified for this specific facility. Tencent deploys cold-plate LC with micro-modules across portfolio but site-specific LC confirmation unavailable. Qualifies on scale for prospecting.

facility_name: Tencent Qingyuan Cloud Computing Data Center
cooling_type: Free cooling (natural cold sources) + T-block modular prefab micro-modules
opportunity_summary: 270,000 sqm total planned. 8 factory buildings + 1 comprehensive building. T-block modular prefab design. PUE <1.25 in high-temp South China. 13.3 MWp rooftop solar. Leading efficiency for the region.
notes: PUE 1.25 does not qualify on PUE threshold (above 1.20). Liquid cooling not verified at this specific site. Tencent uses LC across portfolio per ITU report but site-level confirmation lacking. Included for prospecting given scale and Tencent's LC strategy.

cooling_type: High-density cooling (specific type not disclosed; cold plate likely per China market norms)
opportunity_summary: 4.5B yuan (~US$614M) investment. 205,013 sqm campus. 6 two-story DCs + 1 six-story integrated building. 12,604 server cabinets (12kW each) + 510 network cabinets. Phase 1: 4 DC buildings (construction started May 2023).
notes: Liquid cooling NOT explicitly verified for this facility. ByteDance's GPU clusters require advanced cooling but specific cooling tech not disclosed. Cold plate is 95% of China's LC market. Included for prospecting given scale and AI workload.

cooling_type: Smart DC solution (advanced energy-efficient cooling)
opportunity_summary: Phase 1: three data centers (NTP1, NTP2, NTP3) with 22,500 sqm NFA and 69.5MW IT power. Part of 478MW+ total GDS Johor capacity. GDS Smart DC solution. US$3.4B loan secured for Malaysia ops (March 2025).
notes: Liquid cooling not explicitly confirmed for this campus. Qualifies on MW and strategic importance. GDS deploys LC at China sites (Pujiang verified in W1) but Malaysia site cooling specifics not disclosed.

opportunity_summary: 108MW capacity. Expected completion Q1 2025 (Phase 1). Part of GDS's broader 478MW+ Johor footprint. First phase operations targeted late 2026.
notes: Cooling type not disclosed. Large-scale campus. Included for prospecting. Coordinates approximate.

facility_name: Fujitsu Tatebayashi Data Center (Liquid Cooling Test)
cooling_type: Direct liquid cooling (Nidec high-efficiency system + Fujitsu monitoring software + Supermicro GPU servers)
opportunity_summary: Fujitsu+Supermicro+Nidec collaboration testing at Tatebayashi DC. 40% efficiency improvement over air-cooled. Target: world-class PUE by Q4 FY2025. LC service rolling out Japan-wide early 2026. Subscription model with lifecycle support.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (verified test deployment). Commercial LC service for Japan launching early 2026. Eliminates need for air cooling fans.

cooling_type: Direct liquid cooling system (DLC) as-a-service
opportunity_summary: Launched Jan 2026. DLC-as-a-service combining product sales, installation, 24/7 maintenance. 'Stable operation' service for AI server cooling. Addresses complexity of managing high-performance server cooling.
notes: Service offering rather than specific facility. No specific location -- service deployed across Hitachi Systems data center clients. Qualifies as LC vendor/service provider intelligence.

cooling_type: Ocean-based cooling (seawater cooling for converted cargo ships)
opportunity_summary: MOU for floating DCs using converted used ships. Ocean-based cooling. Focus on Japan, Malaysia, US. First operational units targeted 2027. Reduces land use, enhances energy efficiency.
notes: Announced/MOU stage. No specific location or MW yet. Innovative concept. Cooling uses natural seawater -- not conventional LC but relevant to cooling technology intelligence.

cooling_type: Direct-to-chip liquid cooling (Singapore's largest DTC deployment)
opportunity_summary: 58MW. PUE 1.25 (most energy-efficient multi-tenant DC in tropical Singapore). Singapore's largest DTC liquid cooling deployment. 120,000 sqft, 8-storey. Integrated cable landing station. Green Mark Platinum. 90%+ pre-committed. Brings Nxera total to 120MW.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (DTC verified at commercial scale) and PUE. Opened Feb 2026. Solar + rainwater harvesting + condensate reuse.

cooling_type: Low-GWP cooling chillers (air-based, water waste reduction)
opportunity_summary: 20MW total (4.8MW Phase 1 operational). Launched Feb 2025. Low-GWP chillers, reduced water waste. Global Reference Design (GRD). Brings Colt DCS Inzai total to 70MW. Low embodied carbon construction.
notes: Liquid cooling NOT verified at this facility. Qualifies on capacity. PUE for existing Inzai campus is <1.5. Included for regional intelligence.

facility_name: NTT Global Data Centers Navi Mumbai (NAV1A) - LIC/DCLC
operator_company: NTT Global Data Centers / NTT Ltd.
cooling_type: Liquid Immersion Cooling (LIC) + Direct Contact Liquid Cooling (DCLC)
opportunity_summary: APAC's largest LIC + DCLC deployment. 30MW IT power, 5,000 racks, 37,000 sqm. LC module: 4.8MW across 13,740 sqft. ~30% more energy efficient than conventional cooling. Campus planned up to 150MW (4 DCs). Partners: PhonePe, Sudlows, Dell.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (both LIC and DCLC verified) and MW. First in India to deploy these alternative cooling solutions at scale.

facility_name: NTT DATA / Neysa Hyderabad AI Data Center Campus
operator_company: NTT DATA / Neysa Networks / Telangana Government
cooling_type: Liquid immersion cooling
opportunity_summary: ~US$1.2B investment. 400MW campus (scalable to 500MW). 25,000 GPU capacity. Liquid immersion cooling. Grid + renewable power. Partnership with Telangana state government and Neysa Networks.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (immersion verified) and MW. Announced stage -- exact location within Hyderabad TBD. Coordinates approximate.

cooling_type: Free air cooling + direct liquid cooling + immersion cooling (up to 300kW/rack immersion)
opportunity_summary: 40-acre campus. 600MW+ IT load when fully developed. Phase 1: 250MW sanctioned power. Ultra-high density: 135kW/rack (DLC), 300kW/rack (immersion). Target PUE 1.12-1.32. Dedicated GIS expandable to 900MW. Construction began Sept 2025.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (DLC + immersion verified) and MW. Operational target 2027-28. Solar module facades.

cooling_type: Liquid cooling system
opportunity_summary: Phase 1 launched Aug 2025 with liquid cooling system. CtrlS's first Kolkata campus. Part of broader expansion across India.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (verified). Limited public detail on exact cooling type and MW. Coordinates approximate.

facility_name: Yotta D2 Greater Noida (NVIDIA Blackwell Supercluster)
cooling_type: Advanced liquid cooling (for 20,736 NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra GPUs)
opportunity_summary: US$2B+ investment. 60MW (scalable to 250MW). 20,736 liquid-cooled NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra (HGX B300) GPUs. 800Gbps Quantum-X800 InfiniBand. 40PB parallel storage. Largest NVIDIA DGX Cloud cluster in APAC (US$1B+ 4-year). 10,000+ GPUs for IndiaAI Mission. Live by Aug 2026.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (required for Blackwell) and MW. One of Asia's largest AI superclusters. Navi Mumbai campus scalable to 2GW.

operator_company: ST Telemedia Global Data Centres (STT GDC)
cooling_type: High-density cooling (innovative liquid cooling for GPU clusters)
opportunity_summary: Two new AI-focused DCs on 11.5-acre campus (alongside STT Navi Mumbai 1 under development). High-density cooling for GPU clusters. Projected operational July 2025. Part of US$3.2B India investment (550MW new capacity, nearly tripling current). Part of 150MW campus master plan.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (innovative LC for GPU clusters mentioned). Exact LC type not specified. Coordinates approximate.

facility_name: True IDC AI Hyperscale Data Center (East Bangna)
cooling_type: Liquid cooling + magnetic oil-free water cool chiller + fan-wall unit
opportunity_summary: Thailand's first AI Hyperscale DC. 20MW+ power capacity. Liquid cooling (closed system). Magnetic oil-free water cool chiller (30% energy savings). GPU-optimized. True IDC operates 49MW+ across Bangkok. US$560M loan secured for 102.6MW Rayong expansion.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (verified) and MW. Launched 2025. Three-year investment plan 2024-2027.

facility_name: Chief Telecom Liquid-Cooled GPU Data Center
cooling_type: Direct-to-chip liquid cooling (Zettabyte solutions for NVIDIA GB300 GPUs)
opportunity_summary: Taiwan's first plug-and-play liquid-cooled DC. DTC liquid cooling with NVIDIA GB300 GPUs. PUE below 1.5. 70% occupancy within 3 months. Chief Telecom record revenue NT$2.08B in 1H 2025 (+18.7% YoY). Zettabyte LC solutions deployed Oct 2025.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (DTC verified with NVIDIA GB300). PUE <1.5 does not qualify on PUE threshold. First LC DC in Taiwan. Coordinates approximate.

opportunity_summary: Chunghwa Telecom's first AI power center in Tainan. Part of NTD 32.36B (US$1.08B) AI-ready expansion. NVIDIA partnership for liquid cooling demo lab (April 2026). All-photonics network demo with NTT.
notes: Liquid cooling NOT verified at this specific facility -- NVIDIA demo lab partnership announced April 2026 but specific LC deployment at Tainan not confirmed. Coordinates approximate.

facility_name: Taiwan National Grid Cloud Computing Center (Tainan)
cooling_type: Liquid cooling (for NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 Blackwell cluster)
opportunity_summary: 15MW IT capacity. Home to Nano 4 AI supercomputer: 1,760 NVIDIA H200 GPUs + 144 Blackwell chips in GB200 NVL72 configuration. Launched by President Lai. National sovereign AI infrastructure.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (GB200 NVL72 requires liquid cooling) and MW. Coordinates approximate (Tainan city center).

facility_name: Spark NZ Takanini Data Center (with Heat Recovery)
cooling_type: Chilled water + hot aisle containment closed loop free air cooling (heat recovery to surfing lagoon planned)
opportunity_summary: 12.3MW (recently expanded from 2.3MW, adding 10MW). Planning another 15MW expansion. Design PUE <1.25. Heat exchange to Aventuur surfing lagoon planned. 7-hectare onsite solar farm. EPA approved. IL4 seismic rating.
notes: PUE 1.25 is design target, not verified operational. Liquid cooling (DTC/immersion) not confirmed -- uses chilled water systems. Heat recovery to surfing lagoon is notable innovation. Qualifies on MW. Staged build up to 40MW.

cooling_type: Air-side economiser + chilled-water cooling (liquid-to-chip and hybrid air-liquid racks available)
opportunity_summary: North Shore Auckland location. Air-side economiser + chilled-water. Offers flexible liquid-to-chip and hybrid air-liquid cooled rack options. High-density capabilities for AI workloads.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling option availability (liquid-to-chip racks confirmed). Exact PUE not disclosed.

cooling_type: Outdoor air-side economiser (80% free cooling) + mechanical chillers + liquid-to-chip racks available
opportunity_summary: Datacom's hyper-scale, purpose-built facility for large-scale deployments. Air-side economiser provides free cooling ~80% of the time. Liquid-to-chip and hybrid air-liquid cooled racks available. Designed for future growth.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling option availability (liquid-to-chip confirmed). Free cooling 80% reduces mechanical cooling dependency.

cooling_type: Natural cave cooling (mountain cave thermal mass) + free cooling (cold climate exploitation)
opportunity_summary: China's first cave-integrated DC. 470,000 sqm total. 30,000 sqm computing space in natural mountain caves. 300,000 server capacity (50,000 in cave sections). Five tunnel caves store most critical data. 58% electricity cost savings vs coastal China.
notes: Liquid cooling NOT verified at this facility -- uses natural cave cooling and climate advantage. Included for intelligence on Tencent's China portfolio and innovative cooling approach.

facility_name: SK Group / AWS Ulsan AI Data Center
cooling_type: Hybrid cooling (air + liquid cooling)
opportunity_summary: 15-year strategic partnership between SK Group and AWS. AI Zone with AI-optimized compute, ultra-high-density racks, hybrid air+liquid cooling. Operations expected 2027. Separate from SK Telecom's own Ulsan AIDC (in Wave 1).
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (hybrid confirmed). Distinct from SKT's own Ulsan 100MW AIDC already in Wave 1 (different partnership). Coordinates approximate.

opportunity_summary: 1GW data center announced Jan 2025. Target: scale to 3GW (potentially world's largest). Designed for large-scale AI/LLM infrastructure. Renewable energy powered. Jamnagar refinery campus location.
notes: Liquid cooling NOT verified -- cooling type not disclosed. At 1GW for AI workloads, liquid cooling is near-certain but unconfirmed. Coordinates approximate. Included for massive scale relevance.

cooling_type: Free cooling (air-based) -- liquid cooling portfolio-wide announced but Sydney specifics unclear
opportunity_summary: 67,000 sqm Sydney facility. Target PUE 1.35. Global Switch has announced full suite of LC options portfolio-wide for AI/HPC. Sydney facility uses free cooling. LC pilots underway at European and Hong Kong sites.
notes: PUE 1.35 does NOT qualify on PUE threshold. Liquid cooling at Sydney NOT verified -- portfolio LC announcement does not confirm Sydney deployment. Included for intelligence.

cooling_type: 20C chilled water cooling + free cooling + ceiling-mounted fan units (designed for GPU waste heat)
opportunity_summary: Phase 2 building opened as green DC with 100% renewable energy. >20kW/rack density for GPU servers. 20C chilled water in colocation room extends free cooling utilization. Solar self-generation + green certificates. Designed for AI/GPU high waste heat.
notes: Liquid cooling (DTC/immersion) NOT verified -- uses chilled water cooling. >20kW/rack density indicates high-density capability. Qualifies as prospecting target for LC retrofit/upgrade.

facility_name: NEC Kobe Data Center Phase III
cooling_type: 20C chilled water cooling + free cooling (designed for GPU waste heat)
opportunity_summary: Phase III building. >20kW/rack density for GPU servers. Same chilled water cooling design as Kanagawa Phase 2. 100% renewable energy via solar + certificates. Western Japan location provides geographic redundancy.
notes: Liquid cooling NOT verified -- chilled water system. Same design profile as Kanagawa Phase 2. >20kW/rack makes this a candidate for LC upgrade.

facility_name: Macquarie IC3 East (Macquarie Park) - Submer Immersion
cooling_type: Liquid immersion cooling (Submer via ResetData) + air cooling
opportunity_summary: 11MW IT Load, 13,400 sqm. PUE 1.28. Australia's first Submer liquid immersion cooling setup via ResetData partnership. Supports both air and liquid cooling. CO2 reduction up to 45%. 90% smaller cooling footprint. Heat recyclable, no wastewater.
notes: Qualifies on PUE (near threshold) and liquid cooling (immersion verified). Uptime Institute Tier III certified. Phase 1 completed 2020.

cooling_type: LiquidCore proprietary closed-loop liquid cooling (zero water consumption)
opportunity_summary: New Perth facility expected operational 2026. CDC's LiquidCore proprietary closed-loop cooling (fill once, circulate for life). Zero potable water. Part of CDC's 382MW under construction across Australia+NZ. CDC total: 22 sites, 318MW operating.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (LiquidCore verified across CDC portfolio). CDC already in Wave 1 for Canberra/Sydney -- this is a NEW Perth location.

cooling_type: Advanced cooling unit (new-generation) + single-phase immersion cooling (R&D/tested)
opportunity_summary: PUE 1.08 (new cooling unit, ranked #1 in China at time of measurement). Baidu has experimentally validated single-phase immersion cooling for DC applications. Whole cabinet servers + high-voltage DC + ML-based control systems.
notes: PUE 1.08 qualifies. Immersion cooling researched/tested by Baidu at this facility. MW not disclosed. PUE 1.08 from newer cooling units; earlier measurement was 1.23 (2015).

cooling_type: Advanced cooling (AI-driven controls)
opportunity_summary: Phase 2 expansion of KVDC + IPDC delivering combined 20MW IT load. Uptime III quality, LEED-certified. On track for end-of-2025 completion. Malaysia's largest fibre backbone + subsea cable access. AI-driven cooling controls.
notes: Liquid cooling NOT verified -- AI-driven cooling controls mentioned but specific LC not confirmed. Qualifies on MW. Malaysia's backbone operator.
